name: masics-mario-cloud-viewer
description: Safety, lint, and verification tooling for the MASICS Mario Cloud Viewer.

scripts.check:syntax: find assets tests tools -type f \( -name '*.js' -o -name '*.mjs' \) -print0 | xargs -0 -n1 node --check && if [ -f test-viewer-logic.mjs ]; then node --check test-viewer-logic.mjs; fi
scripts.test:viewer: node test-viewer-logic.mjs && node tests/deployment-safety.mjs && node tests/mounted-path-resolver.mjs && node tests/save-hardening-behavior.mjs && node tests/ai-note-hydrator-behavior.mjs && node tests/storage-fallback-behavior.mjs && node tests/project-separation-guard.mjs && node tests/search-core.test.mjs
